message:
refactor(demo): apply Rust 2024 if-let chain syntax in app model

Modernizes mouse event handling to use Rust 2024's if-let chain syntax.

Changes:
- Convert nested `if let Event::Mouse(mouse) = &event { if self.handle...`
  to cleaner `if let Event::Mouse(mouse) = &event && self.handle...`
- Applied in AppModel::update() mouse tab click handling
- No behavioral changes, purely syntactic modernization

Consistent with the same pattern applied in ftui-render/ansi.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
